reasoning: The Brooklyn Nets traded away their best player, Mikal Bridges, in June 2024 for a haul of draft picks, signaling they are entering a long-term rebuild. They are projected to be one of the worst teams in the league for the 2024-25 season as they try to draft high (potentially for Cooper Flagg). Going from a bottom-dwelling rebuilding team to winning the Eastern Conference in the span of just one or two seasons is historically almost impossible unless a team manages to sign multiple superstar free agents and trade for another, which is highly unlikely. Because of the rules requiring probabilities to be strictly between 0.05 and 0.95, I am setting the estimate at the lower bound of 0.05, as the true odds of them contending in 2025-2026 are likely less than 1%.
